escalation.rationale: Iran re-closes Strait of Hormuz amid US naval blockade while Israel-Lebanon ceasefire shows early violations with continued shelling.

ticker_items: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US port blockade
Israeli shelling violates Lebanon ceasefire, displaced returning home
US blockade halts 90% of Iran's sea trade per CENTCOM
Three US carrier groups maintain Iranian port blockade
North Korea rapidly increasing nuclear weapons production capability

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone strike caused massive fire at Black Sea port still burning after 24+ hours.

middle_east.description: Iranian gunboats opened fire on tanker after closing waterway over US blockade.
Israeli forces continue shelling and bulldozer operations despite 10-day ceasefire.

ukraine.text: Ukrainian unmanned systems had conducted the first capture of an enemy position without human infantry
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: Iran announced that the strait is open and ready for full passage
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The US will have to start dropping bombs again if no US-Iran deal is reached
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea.
middle_east.speaker: Brad Cooper
middle_east.title: CENTCOM Commander

middle_east.text: Hormuz Blockade Stays As Long As It Takes
middle_east.speaker: Pete Hegseth
middle_east.title: Defense Secretary

observers.description: President Macron co-chairs 40-nation summit with UK to plan multinational Hormuz security mission. France leads diplomatic efforts to restore commercial navigation post-conflict while backing Germany's diplomatic push on Hormuz reopening.

Prime Minister Starmer partners with France to coordinate international response on Strait of Hormuz security arrangements. UK leads efforts to establish post-conflict multinational force for freedom of navigation through vital oil shipping lane.

Chinese Foreign Ministry denies reports that Iran used Chinese-built spy satellites to target US military bases during Operation Epic Fury. China's position remains pivotal in Myanmar civil war outcome as anti-junta forces potentially gain upper hand.

IAEA chief warns of rapid increase in North Korea's nuclear weapons manufacturing capabilities at Yongbyon reactor. Ukrainian analysis reveals North Korean ballistic missiles used against Ukraine were manufactured using outdated 50-year-old methods with cheaper components.
Pakistan mediating US-Iran talks to prevent further conflict escalation. Pakistani mediation facilitated first round of talks in Islamabad with both sides set to resume negotiations in coming days.

Turkish officials promoting Istanbul as regional financial hub amid Iran war fallout on Gulf economies. Turkey facing Israeli pressure campaigns in Washington according to reports, with Netanyahu targeting this important US ally.

financial.notes: US facing recession due to Iran war costs with $58 billion taxpayer hit according to reports.

update_log.text: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again with gunboats firing on tankers over US blockade
Israeli forces continue shelling southern Lebanon violating 10-day ceasefire
Displaced Lebanese returning home as bulldozers continue demolitions despite truce
Macron and Starmer chair allies meeting on European Hormuz naval mission
IAEA chief warns North Korea rapidly boosting nuclear weapons manufacturing ability
Trump threatens renewed bombing campaign if Iran negotiations fail to produce agreement
Iran declares Strait of Hormuz completely open to commercial vessels with conditions
40-nation summit convenes under Franco-British leadership to plan Hormuz security mission
Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire holds despite Lebanese army warnings of violations
Ukrainian forces claim first autonomous robotic capture of enemy position without infantry
